description: Hosts create, edit, and manage property listings. Listings include title, description, location, price, and availability dates. Only the host who created a listing can modify or delete it.
functional_requirements: As a host, I can create a new property listing with title, description, location, price, and availability dates
As a host, I can edit or delete my own listings; other users receive a 403 if they attempt to modify my listing
As any user, I can view the details of a specific listing by its ID
non_functional_requirements: Create, update, and delete listing endpoints require JWT authentication
Only the host who created a listing can modify or delete it
